evidence.description: Full unittest suite (110 tests, incl. round-2 regressions: action isolation, waiver latest-event/pagination, policy fail-closed) at the signed head, run by GitHub Actions.
Re-run the full suite at the signed head; allowlisted in .agent-receipts/policy.yml, executed without a shell in a contained cwd.
The v0.2 receipt JSON Schema this receipt conforms to.

evidence.claim: Round-2 gpt-5.5 findings all closed: published action runs python -I from RUNNER_TEMP (pip.py CWD-hijack proven inert); waiver honors only the latest label event with full pagination + fail-closed cap; armed gate hard-fails missing/partial policy. Each fix mutation-checked against its test.

judgment_calls: Isolation: python -I from RUNNER_TEMP for BOTH pip install and the gate run, in the published action and the dogfood workflow. Chosen over installing a pinned wheel because action_path is trusted (the action pinned at the consumer's ref); the only hole was CWD module resolution, which -I closes. Proven by a real-subprocess pip.py test.

Waiver: authorize on the single most-recent labeled/unlabeled event (by id) for the waiver label, requiring latest==labeled by write/maintain/admin. Full pagination with a 100-page cap that fails closed if exceeded (event-flooding cannot bury the newest event).

Policy: an armed gate (anchor present) hard-fails a missing policy.yml and a policy that does not explicitly set require_request_binding. Other safe defaults are kept; only the one security-downgrading default is made explicit-or-fail.

Mutation-checked all four fixes via a file-backup restore (NOT git checkout — git checkout reverts uncommitted work, a footgun that bit round 2 mid-flight and was caught by re-running the suite before commit).

This PR is still judged in bootstrap mode by its own dogfood job: main carries no trust anchor yet, so trusted-gate/ has no gate.py and the job exits 0 with a NOT-CONFIGURED notice, executing nothing from the PR.

request.preview: Round-2: fix the 3 gpt-5.5 re-review findings still open — (CRITICAL) shipped action python not isolated from the PR workspace (pip.py hijack); (HIGH #5) waiver stale-label/pagination; (MEDIUM #8) missing/partial policy silently disables request binding. Add regression tests; keep docs honest; re-sign.
request.source: Round-2 re-review message from team lead (CC), 2026-07-08; 3 still-open findings; exact bytes retained by issuer and build agent
